global.description: The ad features a travel promotion with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel with special fares.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'DriftPass' prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract decorative shape in the center, possibly a circle or square, with a light color that contrasts the background.

elements.label: Travel promotion headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching text that reads 'Book your next trip' in a prominent font, located at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that states 'Special fares today', designed to attract attention to the offer.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Install now', designed to encourage immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, DriftPass logo, travel promotion.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by a decorative shape in the center, with the headline and body text at the bottom, and the CTA button below.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Special fares today, DriftPass, Install now
